releases.description:
## Release Notes 1.1.1 - 08.06.2023

- Setting description changes

### Known Issues
* Comment Section **bold** or *cursive* entries cannot be exited via click (only via pressing enter and going backwards)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release Notes 1.1.0 - 25.05.2023

### New Features
* Add support for variants (depth 1)

### Known Issues
* Comment Section **bold** or *cursive* entries cannot be exited via click (only via pressing enter and going backwards)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release Notes 1.0.0 - 19.05.2023

### New Features
* Import PGNs
* Store game state in JSON
* Add custom PGN viewer
* Only allow legal moves
* Move through the moves via navigation buttons and direct click
* Draw and sync shapes
* Add and sync comments with Markdown support

### Known Issues
* Comment Section **bold** or *cursive* entries cannot be exited via click (only via pressing enter and going backwards)
